evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(2600);for(let i=0;i<2;i++){const ig=[...document.querySelectorAll('a,button')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS igual/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(ig){ig.click();await w(400);}}try{MOS.nav('config')}catch(e){}await w(2000);try{MOS.setCfgTab('categorias')}catch(e){}await w(4200);const c=document.getElementById('catGridContainer');return{cards:c.querySelectorAll('.catcard').length,cmd:!!document.querySelector('#catCmdBar .cmd'),ov:document.documentElement.scrollWidth>innerWidth+1};})()
